mms-chocolate-peppermint-cookies.name: M&m’s® Chocolate Peppermint Cookies
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.

In a large bowl, cream together the butter, granulated sugar, and brown sugar with an electric hand mixer on medium speed until creamy, about 1 minute. Add the egg, vanilla, and peppermint extract and mix until smooth, about 1 minute more.

Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix on low speed until just combined, about 2 minutes. Fold in the chocolate chips, ½ cup Milk Chocolate M&M’s®, and ½ cup crushed peppermint candies with a rubber spatula. Chill the dough in the refrigerator for 15–20 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C). Line 2 baking sheets with parchment paper.
Scoop the dough into 1½- to 2-inch balls and place on the prepared baking sheets, spacing 2 inches apart. Press the remaining M&M’s®and crushed peppermint candies into the tops of the cookies.
Bake the cookies for 8–10 minutes, or until the edges are lightly browned. Remove from the oven and let cool for 5–10 minutes.
Leftover cookies will keep in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
Enjoy!

madeira-style-kebabs-teleculinaria.name: Madeira-style Kebabs

ingredients.item: Paus de loureiro ou espetos de metal q.b.

instructions: Unte um tabuleiro com manteiga, forre-o com papel vegetal e unte novamente.
Light a pot with the olive oil, let it warm, add the chopped onion and garlic and let it saute, stirring from time to time. Add the chicken broth and water, let it boil and rectify the seasonings.
Add the corn meal, always stirring, remove from the fire, lay on the board, smooth and let it cool. Then deform, cut into sticks and reserve.

Cut the meat into lumps or large cubes and stick them in laurel sticks or metal skewers. Season the spikes with salt and pepper and bring them to grill on both sides. Spitter with a chopped herb to taste and serve with the fried corn meal.

maille-mini-cheesecakes.name: Maille Mini Cheesecakes
instructions: Mix cookies, orange zest and melted butter. Cover the bottom of cupcake molds with cookie mixture, packing down with back of a spoon. Refrigerate. Whisk eggs, sugar and Maille Honey Dijon mustard. Add flour, cream cheese, creme fraiche and orange zest. Mix well. Fill cupcake molds with mixture, bake at 350 degrees 35 minutes until firm. Chill 2 hours, garnish with fresh berries and serve.

make-ahead-broccoli-salad-with-bacon-and.name: Make-ahead Broccoli Salad With Bacon And Cheese
instructions: Toss broccoli, cooked bacon, Cheddar cheese, and onion together in a resealable container. Mix mayonnaise, sugar, and cider vinegar together in a separate container until well blended. Refrigerate both until chilled, 30 minutes or up to 1 week.
Just before serving, add dressing to the salad and toss to coat.

mandarin-semifreddo-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Mandarin Semifreddo Recipe
instructions: Throw the pudding contents in a pot, add the sugar and milk and stir well. Take it to the fire, stirring always until boiling, and then boil for 2 minutes.
Put 6 sheets of gelatine on cold water for 5 minutes. Remove the mixture from the pudding from the fire, add the crushed gelatin, stir well until it is well dissolved and let it cool.
Put a hoop on a plate. Have in the interior alternate layers of cookies and pudding already cold. Take it to the cold until solidified.
Demolhe as restantes folhas de gelatina, depois escorra-as e leve-as a derreter em banho-maria ou no micro-ondas, sem deixar ferver.

Beat the cream on a thick whipped cream. Lay the condensed milk in a bowl, add melted gelatin, stir well, add the whipped cream and gently mix. Lie on the solidified pudding and take it back to the cold until it's very firm. Serve nicely decorated.

mandarin-walnut-chocolates-argiro.name: Mandarin Walnut Chocolates

ingredients.item: 150 grcalydescent finely chopped (salted but not in powder form)
150 grcalydescent finely chopped (salted but not in powder form)

instructions: First we wash the tangerines well.
Remove their peels, ground them in the mixer and add them to a pot along with the sugar and juice to boil on medium heat.
Mix from time to time with a wooden spoon.
Allow the mixture to boil until it turns into tight jam and unstuck from the pot walls for about 10 minutes.
Then let it cool a little.
Add the ground nuts, toast and cocoa and mix well with a spoon.
When the mixture cools enough to make it, we take about the size of a nut and make it into a stick or any shape we want.
Each time, before we catch a new piece of the mixture, we dip our fingers in a little cognac.
Place the sticks on a rack or parchment paper and let them dry well.
Then melt the chopped chocolate into a ben marie. Add a few drops of sunflower oil to obtain nice gloss and keep the chocolate warm in very low heat.
Dip the chocolates with tangerine in the melted chocolate and place them back on parchment paper or grill.
Leave until the chocolate is dried and stabilised. We keep them in an airtight vessel in the fridge.
If you prefer orange, you can replace the tangerine and make an equally delicious version.

marinated-anchovies-with-bread-and-butte.name: Marinated Anchovies With Bread And Butter

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced, or  0.5 red Fresno chile, thinly sliced, or  0.75 teaspoon crushed red pepper flakes

instructions: Place anchovies in a shallow dish or small serving bowl and drizzle vinegar over. Let sit 5 minutes, then add peperoncini. Finely grate zest from half of lemon over anchovies. Slice lemon in half and squeeze in juice from both halves; drizzle with oil.
Scoop butter into a small dish and sprinkle generously with salt and pepper if desired. Serve marinated anchovies with bread and butter alongside.

marmalade-ice-cream.name: Marmalade Ice Cream
instructions: An ice cream maker
Combine cream, milk, and sugar in a medium saucepan. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean; add bean. Bring to a simmer over medium-high heat, stirring to dissolve sugar.

Remove pan from heat; cover and let stand for 30 minutes to let flavors meld. Whisk egg yolks in a medium bowl to blend. Gradually add cream mixture, whisking constantly. Return mixture to saucepan and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened, 5–7 minutes.
Strain custard through a fine-mesh sieve into a large bowl set in a bowl of ice water. Let cool completely, stirring occasionally.
Freeze custard in an ice cream maker according to manufacturer’s instructions. Fold in marmalade and transfer to an airtight container. Cover and freeze.
DO AHEAD: Marmalade ice cream can be made 2 days ahead. Keep frozen.

masala-omelette.name: Masala Omelette
instructions: {'step_number': '1', 'instruction': 'Heat olive oil in a nonstick frying pan over medium heat; add onions and cook and stir until translucent, about 3 minutes.'}

{'step_number': '2', 'instruction': 'Pour in beaten eggs. Sprinkle in cayenne, turmeric, pepper, and salt. Keep moving the omelet to avoid burning. Once the edges of the omelet are light brown, flip the omelet over, and cook until fully set, at least 5 minutes, continually moving it in the pan.'}
{'step_number': '3', 'instruction': 'Flip again, sprinkle with cilantro, and serve warm.'}

mascarpone-buttercream-frosting.name: Mascarpone Buttercream Frosting
instructions: Place powdered sugar and butter in an electric mixer fitted with a paddle attachment. Start mixing on the lowest speed. Increase speed to medium and beat until fluffy, scraping down the sides occasionally, about 3 minutes.
Add mascarpone cheese and vanilla paste; mix on medium-low until creamy. Do not overmix frosting at this point, or the butter and mascarpone could separate.

mascarpone-cheese-cake-teleculinaria.name: Mascarpone Cheese Cake
instructions: Start the oven at 180 degrees. Beat the eggs with sugar for about 8 minutes until you get a cute, off-white consistency.
Add the mascarpone cheese, the orange shaving and the pinch of salt and wrap well with a spatula.
Peneire a farinha e misture-a com o fermento. Junte ao preparado anterior, aos poucos e mexendo delicadamente.

Garnish a 22 cm diameter with butter and sprinkle with flour. Lay on it the previous preparation and put it in the oven for about 35 minutes. Remove, cool, peel and serve sprinkled with powdered sugar.

mastic-gum-donut-lezzet.name: Mastic Gum Donut
instructions: 1. Mix dry yeast, powder sugar, drip gum and warm water in a deep bowl.
2. Add and knead flour, salt, milk and olive oil.
3. Relax half an hour by covering the dough with a damp cloth.
4. Take yeast dough into the bees.
5. Prepare long strips by rolling with your hands.
6. Three stripes in the form of hair braid.
7. The same process for all dough is repeated and indexed to oil paper-series oven tray.
8. Spread the egg yolk and sprinkle the sesame.
9. Preheated 200 degree cook in oven for 25 minutes.
10. Serve your service.

matcha-swirl-spritz-cookies.name: Matcha Swirl Spritz Cookies

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 350°. Whisk 2¼ cups (281 g) all-purpose flour and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a small bowl. Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat 1 cup (2 sticks) unsalted butter, room temperature, and ¾ cup (150 g) granulated sugar in a medium bowl until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Scrape down sides of bowl, then beat in 3 large egg yolks and 1 tsp. vanilla extract. Add dry ingredients in 2 additions, beating on medium speed after each to incorporate. Scoop half of dough into another medium bowl; set aside. Mix 2½ tsp. matcha into remaining dough, then add green food coloring if needed to reach desired hue (depending on your matcha, you might need a few drops or none at all).

If using a cookie press, fill with dough, alternating between small scoops of plain dough and matcha dough (this will give your cookies a marbled effect); fit cookie press with wreath disk. Stamp cookies out to fill 2 unlined baking sheets, spacing about 1" apart and refilling press if needed. Bake cookies, rotating baking sheets top to bottom and front to back halfway through, until barely golden at the edges, 7–9 minutes. Let cool on baking sheets 5 minutes (cookies will be very delicate while hot but will firm as they cool). Transfer to a wire rack; let cool completely. Repeat with remaining dough, placing on a cool baking sheet and baking on upper rack.

If not using a cookie press, place a large sheet of parchment paper on a surface. Dollop alternating scoops of plain dough and matcha dough in a line across parchment (this will give your cookies a marbled effect), then tightly press dough into an 8x1½" cylinder, using parchment to help you, and wrap log in plastic. Chill until very firm, about 1 hour. Cut log into ¼"-thick slices and divide cookies between 2 parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing about 1" apart. Bake cookies, rotating baking sheets top to bottom and front to back halfway through, until barely golden at the edges, 14–16 minutes. Transfer cookies to wire racks and let cool.

Meanwhile, melt ⅓ cup white chocolate chips in a small heatproof bowl set over a small saucepan of barely simmering water (do not let the bowl touch the water), stirring occasionally, or melt in a microwave-safe bowl in a microwave in 15-second bursts, stirring to combine between bursts. Transfer to a small resealable plastic bag, seal, and cut end off a corner to make a very small opening. Pipe ribbons onto cookies or decorate as desired.
Do Ahead: Cookies can be baked 3 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

matcha-white-hot-chocolate.name: Matcha White Hot Chocolate

ingredients.item: White chocolate chips (about 1/2 cup) or white chocolate

instructions: Heat chocolate and coconut milk in a small saucepan over medium, stirring, until smooth and chocolate is melted. Bring to a simmer.

Meanwhile, pour 1 cup hot water into a medium bowl or large measuring cup. Sift 2 1/2 tsp. matcha through a fine-mesh sieve into hot water, then whisk mixture until frothy. Whisk chocolate mixture into matcha. Divide between 2 mugs. Top with marshmallows and sprinkle with more matcha.
Hot chocolate can be made can be made 3 days ahead; cover and chill.

meat-soup-with-barley-argiro.name: Meat Soup With Barley

ingredients.item: 4-5 bones beef with a little seek
4-5 bones beef with a little seek

instructions: Wash the bones first and place them in a pot with cold water covering them.
Allow to boil for 40 minutes and ski whenever necessary.
We chop the vegetables with a knife.
Heat the olive oil in a pan and sauce for 3-4 minutes except for the tomato.
Add them to the soup, add the tomato and simmer for 20 minutes.
Add the barley to the meat soup.
Add salt and pepper and simmer for a few minutes to soften the pasta.
Remove the beef, discard the bones and pour the chopped meat into the soup.
Serve with some lemon juice.

megmosa.name: Megmosa
instructions: Pour grapefruit juice into a champagne glass and top with champagne. Garnish with raspberries.

melon-chiller.name: Melon Chiller
instructions: Scrape the cantaloupe meat lengthwise with a spoon or a melon baller and place in a punch bowl.
Add the water and sugar to the punch bowl.
Mix thoroughly until all the sugar is dissolved.
Chill with the addition of plenty of ice cubes.

metsovitiki-leek-pie-epirotiki-argiro.name: Metsovitiki Leek Pie (epirotiki)
instructions: Rinse the rice in a colander first.
Add some lemon to the washed rice to keep it in the pie.
Clean the leaves, Wash them, chop them and steam them for 5′, with 3 cups of water to soften.
Add the price and bottle for 10′′.
Drain the ingredients and place them in a bowl and let them cool a little.
Add the oil, yogurt and beaten eggs, and mix well.
Finally, add the cheeses.
Mix and season.
Spread one leaf into a fireproof, long, large vessel. Gently pull the edges to lift and cover the wall of the baking pan to the middle.
Empty the filling on the puff pastry and spread and straighten the surface.
Cut the second puff pastry leaf into pieces and make drawings on the surface of the pie, leaving gaps for the pie to breathe and the water vapors to go away.
Mix the yolk with the water and spread the pie.
Bake in a well preheated ocean at 200oC with air, medium grill for 10′ and then lower the temperature to 170 oC, continuing baking for 40′ extra, until golden.
Allow the green pie to cool and then cut and serve.
You can also taste the crisp green pie with minced meat.
Still see all my secrets about pies for sure success always!

mexican-black-beans-and-rice.name: Mexican Black Beans And Rice
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-low heat. Add chili powder, garlic powder, cumin, and coriander; cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add celery; cook and stir until softened, 3 to 5 minutes.
Add tomato, corn, oregano, and cilantro; stir to coat. Stir in black beans and salsa; bring to a simmer and cook for 10 to 15 minutes, adding water as needed to keep mixture saucy.
Off heat, stir in cooked rice until coated; season with salt.

microwave-delicata-squash.name: Microwave Delicata Squash
instructions: Place delicata squash halves, cut-sides down, in a microwave-safe bowl. Pour in vegetable broth, season with salt, and cover with a lid.
Microwave until squash easily pierced with a knife, about 8 minutes. Carefully uncover bowl; drain broth. Flip squash; let cool 5 minutes then cut into smaller pieces.
Whisk lime juice, Sriracha, sugar, sesame oil, and fish sauce together in a small bowl until sugar dissolved; pour over squash.

minced-meat-amulet-pie-lezzet.name: Minced Meat Amulet Pie
instructions: 1. For the inner tribute, roast the color of the dough in the olive oil of the onion and mint you eat.
2. The greens you're thin, the peanut and the grape of the bird, and cook for 3-4 minutes.
3. Taste with salt and spices and get from the stove.
4. Definite the springs and rectangle parts on the kitchen countertop.
5. Share the inner mortar rectangles and wrap in the form of muska.
6. Muska börek index oil paper serial oven tray.
7. For the Sauce, mix all the necessary ingredients in a bowl and crawl on the börek with the help of a brush.
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes in the oven with pre-heated 180 degrees.
9. Serve hot.

minced-meat-and-cheddar-pita-recipe-lezz.name: Minced Meat And Cheddar Pita Recipe
instructions: 1. Onions and peppers small chop for inner mortar, liquid oil.
2. Cook the water and the water until the water.
3. Add and mix salça, swelling and swelling.
4. Aka&ccedil in jealous fire off the cover; cook for minutes and leave to cool.
5. Raw interior light heat the water.
6. Take water, milk, tender and salt to the wash container.
7. Add the Unin before 3 water cups, then knead the sacred by adding the avant.
8. Relax the dough for 10 minutes, add liquid oil and knead again and drink it in warm environment.
9. Take the yeast dough 8 equal to the cloth.
10. Cloths open and give the shape of the pide, index to the oiled paper-series tray.
11. 11. 11. 11. Sproduct't the egg road, liquid oil and water mixture.
12. 200°C bake in the fanless oven, pideler on the bottom shelf to the girl.
12. August Service after arrival.
14.  Afiyet olsun.

mini-bagel-pizzas.name: Mini Bagel Pizzas
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.
Arrange bagels, cut-side up, on the prepared baking sheet. Spoon a thin layer of pizza sauce over each bagel half and sprinkle with pizza cheese. Place two pepperoni slices onto each bagel half.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese is melted and pepperoni is lightly browned, about 6 minutes. Let cool slightly before serving.

mini-broccoli-cheddar-quiches-3-ways.name: Mini Broccoli Cheddar Quiches 3 Ways

ingredients.item: Private selection™ vermont extra sharp white cheddar cheese bar

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C). Grease a silicone 24-cup mini muffin tin with nonstick spray.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, heavy cream, milk, Himalayan Pink Salt, and Black Pepper until smooth. Pour into a spouted liquid measuring cup.
Unroll the pie crust and punch out circles the same size as the bottom of the muffin cups. Place the circles in the muffin tin and press down slightly.
Chop the Handpicked Broccoli Florets and divide evenly between the muffin cups.
Chop the Center Cut Bacon and divide evenly between 8 of the muffin cups. Add the diced red onion to another 8 muffin cups, leaving the remaining 8 cups with just broccoli.
Pour the egg mixture into each of the muffin cups until just filled.
Top each muffin cup with a sprinkle of Vermont Extra Sharp White Cheddar Cheese.
Bake the mini quiches for 40 minutes or until the edges just start to turn golden and the centers are set. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
Pop the mini quiches out of the muffin tin. Garnish with the chives and season with Himalayan Pink Salt and Black Pepper before serving.
Enjoy!

minty-blueberry-smoothie.name: Minty Blueberry Smoothie
instructions: Place the blueberries, yogurt or kefir, greens, banana, mint leaves, hemp seeds, and pumpkin seeds in a blender along with the ice cubes and cold water and process until smooth. Divide evenly between two glasses and serve immediately.

miss-oras-fried-chicken.name: Miss Ora's Fried Chicken

ingredients.item: Kosher salt plus more for seasoning
Freshly ground black pepper plus more for seasoning

instructions: Season chicken with salt and pepper. Cover; chill at least 4 hours or overnight.
Combine flour, cornstarch, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/2 teaspoon pepper in a large bag. Working in batches, shake chicken in bag to coat well; transfer to a plate.
Fit a large deep heavy straight-sided skillet with a deep-fry thermometer; add oil to measure 3/4 inch. Heat over medium-high heat until thermometer reads 350°.
Working in batches and maintaining oil at 350°, fry chicken and fatback (if using) until crisp and chicken is cooked through, 5-7 minutes per side. Drain on paper towels and season with salt.

mochi-covered-strawberries.name: Mochi-covered Strawberries

ingredients.prep: sweet red or white bean paste; optional

ingredients.item: Find mochiko and koshian at japanese markets or online.

instructions: Mix mochiko, sugar, and ⅓ cup plus 2 Tbsp. cold water in a small bowl. Cover with foil. Bring 2" of water to a simmer in a large pot. Fit with steamer basket; add bowl to basket. Cover pot with a tight-fitting lid. Steam until mixture is translucent and gummy, 20–22 minutes. Remove bowl and stir mixture until a thick, smooth, slightly sticky dough forms.
Meanwhile, schmear strawberries all over with bean paste, if using.

Sprinkle a surface lightly with potato starch; turn out mochi on top. Dust with more starch; cut into 8 pieces. Stretch a piece of mochi around a strawberry to encase; pinch together to close. Roll between your palms to smooth; brush off excess starch. Repeat with remaining mochi and strawberries.
Do Ahead: Strawberries can be wrapped in mochi 4 hours ahead. Store tightly covered at room temperature.

monastery-pumpkin-pie-argiro.name: Monastery Pumpkin Pie

ingredients.item: 11⁄2 kg sweet pumpkin cleaned and cut into cubes
11⁄2 kg sweet pumpkin cleaned and cut into cubes

instructions: Add the pumpkin to a pot first, add water just to cover it and bottle for 5′.
We empty it in a colander to drain.
Add half the olive oil to the pot and sauté the drained pumpkin in medium heat until it drinks all the liquids it reacts.
When cold, add the walnut, toast, cinnamon, clove, sesame, honey and sugar.
Mix well.
Brush with olive oil a baking pan and spread half the crust leaves with a tahini.
Pour the filling into the baking pan and spread with tahini over the rest of the leaves.
Place in pieces, sprinkle with the rest of the oil and bake in a preheated oven resistances up to 180oC for one hour until golden.
We let it cool.
Serve and sprinkle with powder and cinnamon sugar.

moroccan-halibut-and-carrots.name: Moroccan Halibut And Carrots
instructions: Sprinkle both sides of fish with salt and freshly ground black pepper, then with half of cinnamon and cayenne. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in heavy medium skillet over medium-high heat. Add fish. Sauté until brown and just opaque in center, 4 to 5 minutes per side. Transfer fish to plates. Remove skillet from heat and wipe out. Add remaining 1 tablespoon butter, carrots, lemon juice, and lemon peel. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, and remaining cinnamon and cayenne. Toss to blend. Cover and cook over medium-low heat until carrots are just tender, about 5 minutes. Mix in mint. Mound carrots on fish and serve.

mushroom-and-rice-pilaf.name: Mushroom And Rice Pilaf
instructions: Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat. Add onion and saute until the onion has softened and turned golden brown, 5 to 8 minutes.
Add consomme and mushrooms; bring to a boil.
Remove from heat and stir in rice. Cover and let sit until rice has absorbed all liquid, about 5 minutes.

mushroom-quiche-lezzet.name: Mushroom Quiche
instructions: 1. Prepare the dough according to the tariff.
2. Broadcast gently with your hands on lubricated small dirt molds.
3. Beat milk, vegetables and grated cheese in a deep bowl.
4. Peel and slice the mushrooms with the help of a pointed blade, which is wiped with a damp cloth.
5. Peel onions and chop it in the form of membranes.
6. Heat the sunflower oil in a large pan and roast onion.
7. Add mushrooms, chopped onions and spices and continue to roast several minutes.
8. Get from January.
9. Spread the material into the dies covered by dough.
10. Milky egg mixture also pour on vegetables.
11. 11. Cook for 25 minutes in the oven, which is pre-heated to 200 degrees.
12. Serve hot.
13.  Afiyet olsun.

mushrooms-with-soy-butter.name: Mushrooms With Soy Butter

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Assorted fresh mushrooms (such as white button
ingredients.prep: crimini, oyster, hen of the woods, and stemmed shiitake)

instructions: Finely chop scallion to measure 1 Tbsp. Process butter and soy sauce in a food processor, scraping down sides frequently, until smooth and well blended. Transfer to a small bowl; stir in chopped scallion. Season soy-scallion butter with salt and pepper.

Place mushrooms in a large bowl. Thinly slice remaining scallions on a sharp diagonal. Set aside 1/4 cup scallions for garnish; add remaining scallions to mushrooms. Drizzle with oil, season with salt and pepper, and toss to coat.

Place two 18x12-inch sheets of parchment paper, or heavy-duty foil if grilling, on a work surface. Divide mushrooms evenly on one half of each sheet; dot each with 4 Tbsp. soy-scallion butter. Fold foil over mixture and crimp 3 edges tightly to form a sealed packet. DO AHEAD: Packets can be made 4 hours ahead. Chill. Let stand at room temperature for 15 minutes before continuing.

Preheat oven to 425°. Arrange packets in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet. Alternatively, build a medium-hot fire in a charcoal grill, or heat a gas grill to high. Bake or grill packets until mushrooms are tender (carefully open 1 packet to check; steam will escape), about 15 minutes. Carefully cut open packets. Dot each with remaining soy-scallion butter. Garnish with sliced scallions.

mussels-with-chorizo-and-tomatoes-on-toa.name: Mussels With Chorizo And Tomatoes On Toast

ingredients.item: Chopped cilantro leaves with tender stems

instructions: Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large heavy pot or Dutch oven over medium. Add chorizo and cook, stirring occasionally, until browned and crisp, 2–3 minutes. Add onion, fennel, 5 garlic cloves, and 3 Tbsp. oil and cook, stirring often, until vegetables are softened but not browned, 8–10 minutes. Add tomatoes, red pepper, and ¾ tsp. salt and cook, stirring, until warmed through, about 2 minutes longer.

Add wine and cook, stirring occasionally, just to burn off some of the alcohol, 1–2 minutes. Add mussels and beans and stir once or twice to incorporate. Cover pot and steam until all mussels are open, 3–5 minutes. Discard any that do not open. Stir in cilantro. Cut 1 lemon in half and squeeze in 1 Tbsp. lemon juice.

Meanwhile, working in batches, heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium. Add bread and cook until golden brown and crisp on one side, about 2 minutes. Transfer toast to a medium bowl. Rub cooked sides of toast with remaining garlic clove; season with remaining ¼ tsp. salt.
Spoon mussel mixture and broth over toasts. Cut remaining lemon into wedges and serve alongside.

mussels-with-vinaigrette-and-fresh-peque.name: Mussels With Vinaigrette, And Fresh
mussels-with-vinaigrette-and-fresh-peque.original_name: Mejillones a la vinagreta, fáciles y fresquitos

ingredients.item: ½ yellow or orange pepper (optional about 60 g)
1 small mature tomato or several cherry tomatoes (about 100 g)
½ white onion or onions (about 60 g)
4 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra (unos 40 ml)
1 and ½ tablespoons of white wine vinegar (about 15 ml)

instructions: Lavamos bien los mejillones, retirando las barbas y raspando las conchas si es necesario.
Los ponemos en una olla grande con un dedo de agua, tapamos y cocinamos a fuego fuerte hasta que se abran (unos 5-6 minutos). Retiramos del fuego y dejamos templar.
While they're cold, we're preparing the vinegar. We first pic the very finite red pepper into cubes.
Luego cortamos el pimiento verde y si lo hemos comprado, el amarillo.
Then we minced the onions into very small cubes.
We pat tomato into small cubes as the rest of the vegetable.
Mezclamos todo en un bol con el aceite, el vinagre y una pizca de sal. Reservamos en la nevera para que coja sabor.
Once the mussels are cold, we remove one of the shells and leave only the part with meat. We put them on a plate or fountain.
With a blade, we distribute the vinegar above each mussel, trying to get some water to fall and juicy as well.
Mantenemos en la nevera hasta el momento de servir.
